title: SQLancer query: 'bat.append' undefined
poc: CREATE TABLE t0("c0" DOUBLE NOT NULL);
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (id INT PRIMARY KEY, value DOUBLE NOT NULL, description TEXT);
INSERT INTO t1 (id, value, description) VALUES (1, 3.14, 'Pi value');
CREATE TABLE t2 (ref_id INT REFERENCES t1(id), amount DECIMAL(10, 2) DEFAULT 0.00);
INSERT INTO t2 (ref_id, amount) VALUES (1, NULL);
SELECT AVG(value) FROM t1 WHERE value IS NOT NULL AND id IN (SELECT ref_id FROM t2 WHERE amount > 0);
